subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou didst write was noted. Praise be to God for the service with which thou art charged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید الحمد لله بخدمتی که مامور بان
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @parliaments; constitutional government, @rejection, opposition and persecution
